title: fish bucket variants
description:
This resource pack gives the fish buckets (Tropical fish, Axolotl, Salmon) different textures depending on the mob variants.

Using the shift key will display a 3D rendering of the entity in the bucket.
body:
This Resource Pack is part of P&S Variated Item Pack. 

If you want more variated items like this resource pack, check [P&S Variated Item Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/HP6d4QQ9)!

## Texture variants
![Fish Bucket Texture Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc1dc9d8b8254bf92c7f59090c3517da50141331.png)
![Fish Bucket Texture Variants - Tropical Fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dcfd855880615b677233aec5286d8df0576a680.png)

This resource pack gives the fish buckets different textures depending on the mob variants.

### Texture variants include:
- Tropical fish (Pattern, Base Color, Patter Color)
- Axolotl (Variant)
- Salmon (Size)

## Extended View Entity display
![Fish Bucket Extended View Entity Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/595168903b5e13284ddced0cd2b24d13f5d3f48f.png)
![Fish Bucket Extended View Entity Display - Tropical](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfc7665c41326618860eba495abbbc1150df3d5f.png)

Using the shift key will display a 3D rendering of the entity in the bucket. 

This makes it easier to see what the fish looks like.

### Shift Entity display includes all types of fish buckets :
- Cod
- Salmon
- Pufferfish
- Tropical fish
- Axolotl
- Tadpole

## Sealed Fish Bucket
![Sealed FIsh Buckets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f1ed2562d98405634bd3933a64f24428e6ad24.png)

Fish buckets that dosen't have "bucket_entity_data" component has can shape sealed textures.

This means Fish bucket from trading or creative inventory will have can shape textures.

## Fish Item Texture Variants
![Fish Item Texture Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97d2fbab3b26457038d051ddda11f889a16f8eb8.png)

If you give tropical_fish items a [tropical_fish/pattern, base_color, pattern_color] component with commands, it will also display a variation of that texture.

It also works for salmon and cooked_salmon for [salmon/size] component.
